title: Indulgent Flaky Herb Crumble
description: A savory and indulgent dish featuring a blend of herbs, lean minced steak, and a flaky crumble for a Norwegian-inspired snack.

ingredients.name: Lean ground beef
ingredients.notes: Beef should be lean to keep the dish lighter.

ingredients.name: Herb blend (oregano, thyme, parsley)
ingredients.notes: Fresh herbs are preferable for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Heavy cream or half and half

instructions: Mix the ground beef with the herb blend, salt, and pepper. Form into small patties.
Fry each patty until golden brown on both sides in a non-stick skillet.
In another bowl, whisk together eggs, almond flour, heavy cream or half and half, and vegetable oil. Mix well to form an egg wash.
Sprinkle the crumble mixture over the patties and place them in the oven for 5 minutes.
While the patties are cooking, create a crumb coating by mixing butter with all-purpose flour until you have a crumbly dough.
Roll out the dough thinly. Place each patty on top of the crumb layer and spread evenly over the crust. Return to the oven for another 5-10 minutes or until golden brown.
Let it cool down slightly before serving.
